feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Custom report creation
entry.content:
Can we use custom Adobe Form instead of custom CDS view to create new report?

Our customer requires a report with custom header, footer and custom layout instead of table format. It also needs to involve custom logic with report selection criteria. What is the best practice to create new reports with layout design?

entry.title: Copy control from SO to PR/PO
entry.content: Client currently manually copy SO’s long text to PR/PO’s long text. However, we are not able to find any copying rules or relevant settings in S4/Hana Cloud Public Edition can bring information from SO. Please advise best practice in order we can configure the system to copy long texts from SO to PR/PO automatically.

entry.title: Export product ID in SO/PO
entry.content: In SO and PO display/export function, the result shows the product ID with description, i.e. Description (Product ID)”. Can they just export product number in Export function?

entry.title: MRP strategy plan missing
entry.content:
No strategy plan “Planning without final assembly (50)” can find in S4/Hana Cloud Public Edition. Which strategy plan is replaced (50) plan?

Relevant documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2bba750d1e124e1ea2a039bb1cd9b6c5/9c22bf53d25ab64ce10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US&q=strategy%20group

entry.title: Help: the configuration path for the ""Tax Tape"" field in the "vendor:Tax Data" tab
entry.content: Help: Can anyone tell me the configuration path for the ""TAX tape"" field in the "vendor:Tax Data" tab of the Supplier  data in SAP ES?

entry.title: adding RSS News to News FIORI in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

In our public S4 system L2B/080 we can activate news containing what's new standard from SAP.
is it possible to add custom news feed, please kindly share the link information how to add custom news feed.

Thank you.

best regards, 

Freddy


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Copy control from sales order to invoice
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a request from the client to create a single sales invoice for several orders from the same business partner.

IIn SAP Public Cloud, invoices are separated if they have a different reference in the header and not only by client or payment method. To control this, it would be necessary to modify the copy control from the sales document to the invoice, but in customazing we only have these points for the copy control.

At one point there is only copy control for sales orders between themselves, and the other for invoice documents between themselves, but there is no customazing point of copy control between orders and invoices.

Is there a way to modify the copy control between orders and invoices in order to control the billing partition?

entry.title: How do I post goods receipt with reference to a sales order?
entry.content:
Hi I have customer scenario, 

Presently no ERP with customer so they build their own software and using it

Scenario: Customer receive material with reference to sales order and service in their own service center and deliver back to customer and raise invoice 

How do we can do the receive material with ref to sales order in sap public cloud? We have tried Post Good Receipt with order reference(This process required us to choose the supplier mandatorily) but we want to link either customer (or) sales order, Is there any specific movement we can use to achieve this scenario except 501?

Regards

Janarthanan

entry.title: How can I clear the WIP balance in TECO production order?
entry.content:
Hello Community!

How do we handle scrap processing for production orders and WIP (Work in Progress) balance for TECO status items?

We are using Event-Based Production Cost Posting (3F0).

Current status of production orders

 

- Cancelled after material costs were added

- Partial processing costs added: At standard cost

- Production order TECO status

Currently Display line Items in General ledger App. there is a remaining WIP balance.

 

How can I clear the WIP balance?

Please help me.

Huny.

entry.title: #COE#BUMA - How to disable SAP system notifications for feedback
entry.content:
We are frequently receiving notifications to provide feedback to SAP.

We have many applications which is executed by BOT and the process stops when bot receives this type of notification. Is there a way to deactivate these types of notifications?

entry.title: #CoE#BUMA API for Multiple Asset Postings
entry.content:
Hi,

In the SAP S/4HANA 2408 release upgrade, some Asset Accounting apps, such as Post Acquisition (Non-Integrated) - With Automatic Offsetting Entry, are being deleted and replaced with the Post Asset Acquisition - And Quantity Adjustment app.

However, the new app doesn’t support posting for multiple assets simultaneously. According to SAP documentation, this can be achieved using the relevant API (see Fixed Asset – Post Asset Acquisition).

Can anyone provide guidance on how to use this API to enable multiple asset postings with the Post Asset Acquisition - And Quantity Adjustment app?

Thank you.

Regards,

Rizzei

entry.title: Get a Product's parts price history from SAP
entry.content:
I know this question has a little complicated.

First of all, let me talk about our system. All our products are OEM, no production, no sales. Purchasing is also paying by the project, not by the parts of a product.
Now I need to find a place to either build the product bom master data or something else. I need to maintain the price of each part of a product here and be able to see the historical price of the part. Where should I do this? Like the standard cost of finance? Or something else?

The very important is not current price, is history price...

entry.title: How to assign particular user to app variant
entry.content:
Hi. I'd appreciate it if you could help me with this matter.

I made app variants using adapt UI function. Is it possible to assign this app variants to particular user?

I add an explanation of what I ultimately want to do.

I'll make a app using create custom business object. This app is simple, just enter several data, that's all. I want to limit the fields that each user can enter. For example, user1 can enter(see) the field 1, user2 can enter(see) the field,, etc. And only the manager of this app can see the all field.

It would be nice if there was a way to assign a user to the app variant, but if there isn't, would there be a way to implement the above method?

entry.title: #CoE#BUMA API for Changes in Material (MM)
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Good day!

May I ask if there is an API which has values ChangeDocPreviousFieldValue and ChangeDocNewFieldValue to get the changes in material since the CDS is currently not available in S/4 HANA Public Cloud.

I saw an API reference A_ChangeRecordHistory, is this an API for material changes? same as the one being displayed in (MM04)?

Thank you and regards!

John

entry.title: Adobe Custom PickList form in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to add a custom field in a pick list form.

 

1.I have created a custom field 'storage Bin' using app 'custom fields' and enable the usage in my custom form.

 

2. i have created a badi implementation using 'BD_COBADICFL_MFGORDER_CMP_INIT' badi, but the custom field which i created is not available in the BADI. 

Is there any step am i missed out? Can anyone help on this

entry.title: Odata API about Display material Cost Estimate
entry.content:
Hi，

   I want to see ALL the material cost estimate and cost estimate history that finance changed. Can I get the data through APP: Display material Cost Estimate?  If can, Which Communication Scenario should I configure Odata API in SAP app: Communication Arrangements?

Not sure it can works, because in this APP, Seems I can only see price one by one, not batch.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Upload Programs in SAP Public Cloud for Custom tables
entry.content:
We are currently in the evaluation phase for SAP Public Cloud Implementation. Client has many upload programs to custom Z tables in their ECC system.

They expect the same to be available in Public Cloud which is recurring exercise for doing the uploads.

Is it feasible to do the same using CUstom Business Objects ? Is BTP required for doing the same?

 

Regards

Deep

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: Alternative to I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate
entry.content: Hi everyone, is there an alternative to the CDS View I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate which is released for Cloud Development?

entry.title: Creation of an new Company Code.
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Our management requires us to setup a new Company code DIGITS in our SAP S/4HANA Public cloud environment.

May we know what are prerequisite, procedure notes  and/or items that we need to take note to setup a new Company code (Organization structure) in S/4HANA Public cloud?

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CDS for Bill of material item and dependency.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have configured variant config in SAP S4HANA Public cloud system and maintain a super BOM in which dependencies are assigned to its components. 

Ex-- we have a KMAT material (A) and its variant materials (AB, AC, AD). when we check the BOM for material-A in CS13, super BOM is displayed with lets say 20 component. But when we check BOM for material-AB, only 5 components are displayed as per dependency assignment in super BOM.

Now the requirement is to create a report for details of BOM Component for variant material (which will show BOM details of AB, AC, AD.) I have checked in public cloud system but did not found any CDS where I can find a link between dependency and BOM item.

Is there any other CDS which I can use for this purpose.

Thanks.
